content:
# Micp

**Summary**: A method used to characterize pore throat size distribution and permeability.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] used MICP to determine pore-throat sizes and evaluate the impact of pore geometry on permeability.

- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] used MICP to characterize pore throat distributions in D5 and D6 units.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] used core plug analysis to determine permeability and porosity.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] used MICP to characterize pore throat sizes across different lithofacies in the Upper Kharaib Member.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] used micro-CT scanning and pore network modeling to quantify permeability in burrow fillings.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] used MICP to characterize pore throat distributions in D5 and D6 units.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] used core plug analysis to determine permeability and porosity.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] used MICP to characterize pore throat sizes across different lithofacies in the Upper Kharaib Member.

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] used micro-CT scanning and pore network modeling to quantify permeability in burrow fillings.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The curves showed a bimodal distribution of pore-throat sizes for the samples. ([[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014, p. 132]])

- Identified main throat peaks and petrophysical parameters for various lithofacies. ([[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020, p. 102]])

- Core plug-based permeability in F2 ranged from 0.01 to 0.6 mD, while spot measurements reached up to 9 mmD. ([[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022, p. 83]])

- Grainstone-dominated facies were found to have larger pore throat sizes and lower water saturation profiles compared to mud-dominated facies. ([[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024, p. 117]])

- Simulated permeabilities were compared with spot measurements to validate the impact of isolated pores on flow behavior. ([[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025, p. 120]])
